title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 546.690 - Statement of conviction and judgment to governor
text:
546.690.  Statement of conviction and judgment to governor. — The judge of a court at which a conviction is had must, immediately after the conviction, transmit to the governor of the state, by mail or otherwise, a statement of the conviction and judgment.
(RSMo 1939 § 4109) 
Pardons, governor's powers, conditions and restrictions, 217.800
